entries.definition:
kh–ṭ–w step, to take a step; way, tracks; to overtake, to avoid. Of this root, خُطُوَات khuṭuwāt occurs five times in the Qur’an.
خُطُوَات khuṭuwāt [pl. of n. of unit خُطْوَة khuṭwatun] footsteps (2:208) وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا خُطُوَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ and do not follow in Satan’s footsteps.

272
entries.definition_english:
kh–ṭ–w step, to take a step; way, tracks; to overtake, to avoid. Of this root, خُطُوَات khuṭuwāt occurs five times in the Qur’an.
خُطُوَات khuṭuwāt [pl. of n. of unit خُطْوَة khuṭwatun] footsteps (2:208) وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا خُطُوَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ and do not follow in Satan’s footsteps.

272
